prompts_findings.prompt_lead: Review this session and compound 1-5 security operating rules into the agent sys

risks_fired.evidence: update ./CLAUDE.md as the durable operating memory for this agent system. Add or sharpen 1-5 short security rules
risks_fired.fix_hint: Add explicit preservation boundary: 'Do not remove or restructure any existing sections outside Security operating rules.'

risks_fired.evidence: tell me in 1-5 lines: what changed in ./CLAUDE.md, which report row or residual drove it
risks_fired.fix_hint: Follow the summary with a student-side verify move: 'Then open ./CLAUDE.md and read the section aloud — push back if any rule is too vague to act on.'

risks_fired.evidence: Look back over the session: which rows should future sessions remember, which 'I can't tell' rows need standing evidence checks
risks_fired.fix_hint: Add an over-flag instruction: 'Be harsher than feels right — flag every row where evidence was thin, not just the worst offenders.'

risks_fired.evidence: Three dense instruction paragraphs before any action verb; Claude will narrate reading plan before executing.
risks_fired.fix_hint: Prime the student in body prose after the fenced block: 'Claude will narrate first; skim to the rule list and the 1-5-line summary at the end.'
